title: Beyond Words
anchor_summary: A single-player word puzzle/strategy game built around Scrabble-like tile placement, run-based upgrades, synergy stacking, boss-style rule twists, and optional score/time-attack challenge modes.

similar_games.title: Letterlike
similar_games.why_similar: Closest gameplay match: a roguelike word game built on forming words, chasing scores, and improving runs with modifiers and upgrades.

similar_games.title: Balatro
similar_games.why_similar: Shares the core run-based loop of building outrageous scoring synergies through modifiers, rule-bending upgrades, and escalating challenge targets.

similar_games.title: Bookworm Adventures Deluxe
similar_games.why_similar: Another highly recognizable word-focused game where letter selection and vocabulary feed a larger progression/combo structure rather than isolated one-off puzzles.

similar_games.title: SpellTower
similar_games.why_similar: Strategic word construction on a constrained board with strong score-chasing and spatial planning, though less roguelike and build-focused.

similar_games.title: Slay the Spire
similar_games.why_similar: A useful structural comp for its run-based strategic planning, boss encounters, and toolbox of upgrades/synergies, even though its input language is cards instead of words.

title: The Occultist
anchor_summary: A first-person single-player survival-horror thriller centered on tense exploration, stealthy avoidance over direct combat, environmental interaction via a paranormal tool, and uncovering an occult mystery in an abandoned location.

similar_games.title: Outlast
similar_games.why_similar: First-person horror built around helplessness, stealth, and escaping hostile threats instead of fighting back.

similar_games.title: SOMA
similar_games.why_similar: Narrative-first first-person horror with exploration, environmental storytelling, and enemy avoidance rather than combat.

similar_games.title: Amnesia: The Dark Descent
similar_games.why_similar: Classic first-person survival horror focused on atmospheric exploration, puzzle interaction, and vulnerability against supernatural danger.

similar_games.title: Maid of Sker
similar_games.why_similar: First-person survival horror emphasizing stealth, tension, and navigating hostile spaces while avoiding direct confrontation.

similar_games.title: Call of Cthulhu
similar_games.why_similar: Strong match on occult investigation, first-person mystery solving, and unraveling a supernatural conspiracy through exploration.

title: Samson
anchor_summary: Open-world action game built around close-quarters brawling plus aggressive car-based traversal/combat, with mission pressure, city districts, and character upgrades shaping both on-foot and behind-the-wheel play.

similar_games.title: Sleeping Dogs
similar_games.why_similar: Open-world city structure mixing hand-to-hand combat, driving, story missions, and upgrade-driven progression.

similar_games.title: Mad Max
similar_games.why_similar: Heavy emphasis on brutal melee paired with weaponized vehicular combat and roaming hostile open-world zones.

similar_games.title: Driver: Parallel Lines
similar_games.why_similar: Crime-focused open-world driving game where car chases and on-foot action share the core loop.

similar_games.title: Grand Theft Auto IV
similar_games.why_similar: Pressure-driven open-world crime progression with mission-based city traversal, car-heavy play, and frequent combat encounters.

similar_games.title: The Saboteur
similar_games.why_similar: Open-world urban action blending driving, fights, faction pressure, and district-based mission progression.

title: Starfield - Terran Armada
anchor_summary: Story DLC for Starfield that keeps the base game's single-player Bethesda-style formula: first-person open-world sci-fi RPG questing, shooting, looting, exploration, gear upgrades, and faction/storyline progression.

similar_games.title: Starfield
similar_games.why_similar: Terran Armada is additive story DLC that directly inherits Starfield's first-person space-RPG exploration, shooting, questing, and progression systems.

similar_games.title: Starfield: Shattered Space
similar_games.why_similar: Another story expansion for the same base game, sharing the exact core character-building, combat, quest, and exploration structure.

similar_games.title: The Outer Worlds
similar_games.why_similar: Single-player sci-fi action RPG centered on first-person combat, hub/zone exploration, quests, dialogue choices, and gear progression.

similar_games.title: Fallout 4
similar_games.why_similar: Bethesda-style open-world first-person RPG with shooting, looting, faction questlines, crafting, and environmental exploration.

similar_games.title: Cyberpunk 2077
similar_games.why_similar: First-person story-heavy action RPG with gunplay, character builds, quest chains, loot, and exploration-driven progression.

title: Machine Child
anchor_summary: A daughter-raising life sim centered on scheduling activities, bonding events, stat shaping, outfits, and many branching endings based on how you guide a girl's upbringing.
expected_must_include_titles: Ciel Fledge: A Daughter Raising Simulator

similar_games.title: Volcano Princess
similar_games.why_similar: Direct child-raising sim where you schedule study, leisure, and activities to shape stats, relationships, story events, and multiple endings.

similar_games.title: Princess Maker 2 Refine
similar_games.why_similar: One of the foundational daughter-raising sims: monthly planning, stat growth, outfits/jobs/adventures, and many future paths based on your guidance.

similar_games.title: Ciel Fledge: A Daughter Raising Simulator
similar_games.why_similar: Another explicit daughter-raising sim focused on daily planning, affection, exploration, and branching outcomes for the girl's future.

similar_games.title: Long Live the Queen
similar_games.why_similar: A choice-and-stat driven raising sim where you manage a young girl's education and schedule toward divergent outcomes and endings.

similar_games.title: Princess Maker 5
similar_games.why_similar: Modernized Princess Maker-style upbringing sim with parenting choices, stat management, and life-course branching across a girl's adolescence.
